backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Order, Karigar, DesignMapping) and canister methods for order management including saving, supplying, status transitions, karigar registration, and design mappings with blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering UI fixes for dark-background card visibility, karigar name display, navigation, and export buttons.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and key changes, serving as a build/planning reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) applied via the `.dark` class.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Jewellery Order Management System' that mounts the app at `#root` and loads `src/main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, ingest, karigar detail, ageing stock, etc.), wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and renders the sidebar layout.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Custom: Dashboard tab that filters and displays CO-type Pending orders with a search input supporting filtering by order number, design code, or generic name.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Design: A modal dialog component that fetches and displays a design image by design code, supporting zoom and pan interactions via mouse and touch events.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Hallma: A dashboard tab that displays orders in the Hallmark status, grouped by design, with filtering, bulk status updates, and export (Excel/PDF/JPEG) functionality.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Kariga: A dashboard tab that groups pending orders by karigar (artisan) name using live design mappings and renders clickable karigar cards that navigate to a karigar detail page.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/OrderT: A reusable table component for displaying orders with optional bulk selection, mark-as-ready actions, delete, and export (Excel/PDF/JPEG) capabilities.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ReadyT: A dashboard tab showing orders in the Ready status, grouped by design, with search filtering, bulk mark-as-pending actions, and export functionality.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Summar: Renders summary metric cards (order counts, weight, quantity, CO orders) for the dashboard, computing different metrics based on the active tab (ready, hallmark, customer, karigars, etc.).
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Suppli: A dialog component that allows users to input supplied quantities for RB orders, supporting partial supply where remaining units stay as Pending, and submits via a batch supply mutation.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TotalO: Displays a filterable, grouped table of all pending orders with search, type/karigar filters, export options (Excel/PDF/JPEG), and bulk selection for triggering the supply dialog.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Unmapp: Shows an alert banner listing design codes that are missing generic name or karigar name mappings, with navigation buttons to the unmapped codes and master designs pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppSideba: Renders the application's collapsible sidebar navigation with links to all major routes and a data reset action that opens a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/layout/DataReset: A confirmation alert dialog that permanently deletes all active (Pending, Ready, Return from Hallmark) orders via a reset mutation, with success/error toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/masterdesigns/Ed: A modal dialog component for editing a design mapping's generic name and karigar assignment, using form state, a karigar dropdown populated from existing mappings, and a mutation to persist changes.
frontend/src/components/tagprinting/Webv: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, exposing queries and mutations for orders, design mappings, karigars, and master data by calling the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens) for the design system, plus base styles for transitions, focus, and disabled states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AgeingStock.tsx: A page that displays pending orders grouped by design code with color-coded age bands (green/yellow/red based on days since order date), supporting bulk selection and marking orders as ready.
frontend/src/pages/BarcodeScanning.tsx: A page that supports both hardware barcode scanner (keyboard buffer detection) and camera-based QR scanning to collect order IDs, then batch-updates their status via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that fetches all orders and displays them across tabbed views (Total, Ready, Hallmark, Customer Orders, Karigars) along with summary cards and an unmapped orders section.
frontend/src/pages/DesignImages.tsx: A page for bulk-uploading design images to the backend, supporting both folder selection and ZIP file extraction, with batch processing and progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/IngestOrders.tsx: A page for uploading an Excel file of orders, parsing it, and sequentially saving each order to the canister backend with success/failure reporting.
frontend/src/pages/KarigarDetail.tsx: Detail page for a specific karigar showing their pending orders, with support for exporting (PDF/JPEG/Excel) daily or total orders and marking selected orders as ready.
frontend/src/pages/MasterDesigns.tsx: A page for uploading a master design Excel file that maps design codes to generic names and karigars, then persists the mappings and karigar list to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Reconciliation.tsx: React page for reconciling a master Excel file against existing orders, parsing rows with SheetJS from CDN, displaying diffs, and persisting selected master data rows via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/TagPrinting.tsx: React page that displays ready orders grouped by design code with date-range filtering, checkbox selection, clipboard copy of order numbers, and a hallmark status update dialog.
frontend/src/pages/UnmappedCodes.tsx: React page listing orders missing generic name or karigar mappings, grouped by design code, with inline editing to update or reassign design mappings via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/utils/ageingBadge.tsx: Exports an AgeingBadge component that displays the number of days since an order date with color-coded styling (green ≤14d, amber ≤29d, red 30d+).
frontend/src/utils/excelParser.ts: Utility that dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN and parses an Excel file into an array of ParsedOrder objects, normalizing headers, design codes, order types, and dates.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Provides exportToExcel (CSV download) and exportToPDF (jsPDF-based per-order cards) functions for exporting Order arrays with formatted fields and dates.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing fix features (dashboard card visibility, karigar name display, karigar tab navigation, Ready tab export buttons), and configuration for a bug-fix focused project.
